summary: Selects one of multiple texture inputs based on an index value, with optional blending between adjacent inputs for smooth transitions.

key_params.name: index
key_params.note: Which input to pass through (0-based); fractional values blend between adjacent inputs

key_params.name: blend
key_params.note: Enable smooth cross-fade between inputs when index is fractional

common_gotchas: Index is 0-based: the first input is 0, not 1.
When blend is off, fractional index values are rounded — enable blend for smooth transitions.
